data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Session-level capacity controls', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of such controls. The linked use case specifies the need for session-level capacity controls, yet the evidence does not demonstrate that this requirement has been addressed or validated. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of session-level capacity controls.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of session-level capacity controls.
